evals.prompt: Build the app layout. This is a project management tool with pages for Dashboard, Projects, Tasks, Team Members, and Settings. Users must be logged in. Show a user menu with logout.
evals.expected_output: A sidebar layout using shadcn Sidebar components, with auth-aware branching, a nav with all 5 pages, and a user menu (name + logout). Should feel like a proper tool, not a copy-paste template.

evals.prompt: Create the layout for a recipe sharing app. Pages: Home, Browse Recipes, My Recipes, Favorites. Has light/dark mode toggle. Public pages visible without login, but My Recipes and Favorites require auth.
evals.expected_output: A top nav or creative layout (not necessarily sidebar) with a theme mode switcher, auth-aware nav that shows sign-in for unauthenticated users. Should feel warm and consumer-facing, not like an enterprise tool.

evals.prompt: Build the layout. This is a client portal — Clients see their own projects and invoices, Admins manage all clients and can invite new ones. Different nav per role. Include a user menu.
evals.expected_output: Role-based layout branching between Admin and Client shells. Each role gets appropriate nav items. User menu present. Uses correct useUser() and role-checking patterns.

evals.prompt: Create the layout for a simple QR code generator tool. Single main page. No authentication needed.
evals.expected_output: A minimal layout — no sidebar, no complex nav. Maybe a slim header with the app name. Should not force unnecessary navigation structure onto a single-page utility.
